title: A note on the solvability of a finite group in which every non-nilpotent maximal subgroup is normal
author_string: LIU, Wenjing, SHI, Jiangtao, TIAN, Yunfeng
publisher: The International Electronic Journal of Algebra
abstract: We provide a new and simple proof to show that a finite group in which every non-nilpotent maximal subgroup is normal is solvable.
